target: 16. Last Night
You'll catch a cold.
Hizuru-kun's body is resting in the basement. As for contacting her parents...
We can't do that yet.
...She was apparently a famous novelist. If she was murdered, it will become national news. The media will swarm the island in droves.
The stab wound in her chest can't be hidden. Anyone can see it's a homicide.
You don't have to hide it, this is murder. We know the culprit too. But please, just give me one more day.
Yeah... I underst--
Thank you.
Hm? Ah... sorry... I talked over you...
...It's hard to talk with this on...
Ah, also. About the matter of there being two Shides.
He's a man who has survived for over 300 years by switching bodies.
It wouldn't be strange for him to have a spare, in case he died or got seriously injured from an accident or illness.
So... Haine gave birth to multiple children?
No... that's not it. Shide was "storing" his past bodies, but...
They were all burned up in the last war. I heard that from my father a long time ago...
The corpse in that photo... is still around!?
That would be the case... His previous body, Iwao Karikiri, died 40 years ago... after the war.
I thought carefully preserving one's own corpse was the height of narcissism, but... If it can move, it can be used as a spare.
I have no idea how they're preserved, or how they're moving, though.
<color=#GF_TIPS_084>Sub-account</color>…?
Dr. Hishigata. Please cover your ears...
...What?
...It fell, didn't it. Into the sea.
...Y-You. <color=#GF_KEY_2SECOND>How did you know</color> the lightning would strike!?
(I knew it would strike beforehand... So this is Ryunosuke-san's precognition...)
(Thank you... Ryunosuke-san... Nagumo-sensei.)
(Not only Ushio, but I lost Nagumo-sensei... and Rosencrantz too.)
(Nezu-san's rifle, Ushio's copied shotgun and handgun... they're all gone.)
In contrast, Shide is alive and well... What do I do...? Do we have any chance of winning... with just us...
...About that.
Mio?
What's in your pocket, Shin-chan?
Ah, this... It's a seashell necklace. Ushio's...
There's no reaction when I call out to it, so it's probably... a fragment of the Ushio that disappeared...
...I knew it. That's why Haine ran away.
Huh...?
It's not that there's no reaction, Shin-chan. Us shadows could tell. She was super angry... my sister.
Sister is in here. All of her memories are inside this.
I think she managed to transfer just her memories into the shell right before she disappeared.
But she doesn't have a body... so she can't move like this.
(Ushio's memories are in here... ...So that's why Haine misunderstood and thought Ushio was still alive...)
So Haine retreating at Mt. Takanosu was also thanks to Ushio...
Even though she was reduced to just memories, she still protected you, Shin-chan...
What about this... shell's memories? Did you scan it!?
Impossible. It's made so that other shadows can't read it. Just like Mother...
I think she did that so it wouldn't fall into enemy hands. The only one who can read that data is my sister. But my sister is already...
...Wait a second...!?
...She's coming back.
That's right... tomorrow!! At the festival on the 24th, when the fireworks go off, on that beach...!!
The original her who doesn't know anything yet... will come back!!
...I get it!! If we have tomorrow's sister scan this shell!
Yeah! There's no doubt about it!! That's why she left this behind...!!
Ushio... will be revived!
Shin-chan.
...Yeah.

The rain has stopped.
What are you doing?
Just practicing.
Practicing?
Yeah. Just a little bit.
(Predicting two seconds into the future, I need to be able to use it freely.)
I see... Do you remember? What I said this morning before we left.
If we come back safely, you had something to talk about... right?
Yeah. Tomorrow... is my sister really coming back?
I can't imagine Ushio putting her data into the shell for no reason.
She scanned Shide before she disappeared... She must have figured something out.
It's a gamble, but there's a good possibility...!!
...You look like you've come up with another good plan.
We'll see... I'll tell everyone later. ...Is that what you wanted to talk about?
Huh? N-... Yeah...
Um... you know, Shin-chan!
I said I had something to talk about, right? Well...
...How should I put this...
I like you.
...I like you... I... like you, Shin-chan...
"…Sorry."
M-... Yeah...
...Is that all?
No... t-thank you...
...Did you already know...?
...Yeah...
Ah! It's not like... D-Don't think it's weird, okay! I just... wanted to say it...
We might die tomorrow, you know... I didn't want to die without telling you <color=#GF_TIPS_112>this feeling</color>, Shin-chan!
So... I just... I just wanted to tell you...!!
I see...
...Yeah.
...Sorry, Mio.
I can't return your feelings... Because you're my precious little sister.
...I see...
Ahhh, I feel so much... better!!!! ...Now I won't have any regrets even if I die!
...Sorry. Mio.
I can't return your feelings...
I...<color=#GF_TIPS_094>love Ushio</color>.
...Yeah.
You're my precious little sister.
...Yeah.
Thank you... For telling me properly...
Ahhh, I feel so much... better!!!! ...Now I won't have any regrets even if I die!
Wait, Mio!
Please... don't say any more.
Huh...?
Sorry... I can painfully feel how much courage it took for you to say that...
And that's exactly why... I can't listen to it...
Shin-chan... But, tomorrow is--
Let's survive and overcome tomorrow. Right now, that's the only thing I can think about.
...If you say it like that... I have no choice but to agree. You're so unfair, Shin-chan.
Sorry...
...Hehe. It's fine, I understand...
Shin-chan... Let's do our best tomorrow...!
...Yeah.
(No matter how things turn out, tomorrow... July 24th, everything will be decided...!)
